---
title: "Appendix 3: All Plots - Paper 2 (Ideological Commitment Signaling)"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    self-contained: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: report
    classoption: [a4paper, 12pt]
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    fig-cap-location: top
    tbl-cap-location: top
---

```{r}
#| label: setup-appendix3
#| include: false

library(here)

# Force the correct project root no matter where the render starts from
here::i_am("quarto/appendix3.qmd")
setwd(here::here())

# Copy plots so Quarto can reliably find them
dir.create(here("quarto/plots"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
plot_files <- list.files(here("results/plots"), pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE)
for (f in plot_files) {
  file.copy(f, here("quarto/plots", basename(f)), overwrite = TRUE)
}

library(knitr)
message("Working directory forced to project root: ", getwd())
```

This appendix contains all plots generated for Paper 2 (Ideological Commitment Signaling). Each plot is saved in the `results/plots/` directory and copied to `quarto/plots/` for rendering. The plots include:


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false

# 1. Path from 'quarto/' up to root, then to 'results/plots/'
img_folder <- "../results/plots"

# 2. Grab the PNGs
img_files <- list.files(img_folder, pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE)

# 3. Display them
knitr::include_graphics(img_files)
```


```
